title: Verdict
description: The structured result a gate evaluator produces (ARCHITECTURE.md §5), reused at PR altitude by merge-review (issue #358, docs/design/v0/pr-lifecycle-loop.md §4/§6). The gate maps decision to a branch; merge-review maps it to a label and a checklist pr-remediation must clear. Evidence points at journal artifacts, never inlined state. headSha/baseSha and a finding's class are PR-lifecycle-only — absent on an in-run gate Verdict.

headSha.description: PR-lifecycle only (#358): the PR head commit this verdict was computed against. Re-checked before acting on merge-ready; a mismatch voids the verdict.

baseSha.description: PR-lifecycle only (#358): the base branch commit this verdict was computed against — pins together with headSha.

class.description: PR-lifecycle only (#358): routes this finding to the right pr-remediation action. Absent on an ordinary in-run gate finding.

blockingPrs.description: PR-lifecycle only, cross-pr-blocked findings only (#747): the sibling PR number(s) this finding is waiting behind.
